name: Case Mutation
description: Generates case variants — lowercase, UPPERCASE, Capitalized, cAmElCaSe, and mixed-case versions of every keyword and dork component

name: Separator Mutation
description: Replaces separators between words — underscore, hyphen, dot, colon, slash, and no-separator variants (e.g. db_password, db-password, db.password, dbpass)

name: Synonym Expansion
description: Expands keywords into semantic equivalents — password → pass, passwd, pwd, secret, credentials, key. Expands db → database, DATABASE. Expands config → configuration, settings, setup

name: Framework-Specific
description: Generates dorks targeting known patterns in popular frameworks — Django SECRET_KEY, Rails secret_key_base, Flask SECRET_KEY, Laravel APP_KEY, Spring Boot, Express, and more

name: File Extension
description: Generates dork variants targeting specific file types — .env, .config, .json, .yml, .xml, .ini, .sql, .log, .bak, .pem, .key, .cert, .credentials, .secret
